info.title: Flowise API
info.description: Flowise is an open-source low-code tool for building LLM orchestration flows and AI agents. The API provides endpoints for managing chatflows, predictions, assistants, tools, variables, document stores, and more.

get.description: Ping the server to check if it is running

post.description: Send a question to a chatflow and get a prediction response

get.description: Retrieve a list of all chatflows
Retrieve a specific chatflow by its ID

put.description: Update a specific chatflow by its ID

delete.description: Delete a specific chatflow by its ID

get.description: Retrieve all chat messages for a specific chatflow

delete.description: Delete all chat messages for a specific chatflow

get.description: Retrieve a list of all assistants
Retrieve a list of all custom tools
Retrieve a list of all variables
Retrieve a specific document store with its loader and chunk configurations

delete.description: Delete a specific document store and all its associated data

post.description: Create a new feedback entry for a chat message

get.summary: Get all feedback for a chat message
get.description: Retrieve all feedback entries for a specific chat message

get.summary: Get all leads for a chatflow
get.description: Retrieve all leads for a specific chatflow

post.description: Upsert vector embeddings of documents in a chatflow

get.description: Retrieve all upsert history records with optional filters

patch.description: Soft delete upsert history records by IDs

post.description: Return contents of the files in plain string format

whereUsed.description: JSON string of chatflow IDs using this store
